CONTENT.Honours: Al-HilalSaudi Professional League: 2019–20, 2020–21, 2021–22, 2023–24King Cup: 2019–20, 2022–23, 2023–24AFC Champions League: 2019, 2021Saudi Super Cup: 2021, 2023
CONTENT.Club career: Saleh is a graduate of the Academy of Al-Ahli and played as a striker in the ranks of Al-Ahli junior and youth.Saleh made his debut on 2 September 2012 at Beira-Mar against Moreirense and scored the first goal in his first match. Saleh is the first Saudi Arabian to score in Europe. At his second match against Vitória, he scored the fastest goal in Primeira Liga 12–13. Saleh played two matches and scored two goals with S.C. Beira-Mar.On 20 July 2013, Saleh returned to his club. He made his debut friendly match against Najran and losing the match score 1–0.On 22 July 2024, Al-Shehri joined Al-Ittihad on a free transfer.
CONTENT.External links: Saleh Al-Shehri at Kooora.com (in Arabic) (archived in English at Goalzz.com)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 31 May 2024Statistics accurate as of match played 26 March 2024.Scores and results list Saudi Arabia's goal tally first.
CONTENT.International career: Saleh scored a goal against Qatar national under-20 team in the 2012 AFC U-19 Championship, with Saudi Arabia winning 4–2. Saudi Arabia collected four points, but were eliminated after finishing third.On 22 November 2022, Saleh scored the first goal for Saudi Arabia against Argentina at the FIFA World Cup 2022 held in Qatar.

SUMMARY: Saleh Khalid Mohammed Al-Shehri (Arabic: صالح خالد محمد الشهري; born on 1 November 1993) is a Saudi Arabian professional football player who plays as a striker for Al-Ittihad and the Saudi Arabia national team.
